commands.cmd: read-only deletion dependency, isolation, post-archive and session-safety audit

summary: Deletion transaction passes, but the duplicated intake authorization seam must deny archived profiles to prevent repopulation.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Judge exceeded the single-wait limit, so the PM performed the same read-only gate as permitted fallback.
remaining_blockers: Archived profile UUID remains writable through nutrition-intake-service authorization.
